_notes.source: Transcribed from Yahoo screenshots in data/standings, data/consolation_bracket, data/DraftDay_Projections; podium/PF/ranks from league.json
_notes.delta: projected_rank - actual_rank; positive = outperformed Yahoo draft-day projection
_notes.consolation_final: Name of the deciding game (5th or 7th Place Game depending on league size that year)
_notes.caveat: Yahoo projections assume draft-day rosters; over/underperformance mixes draft luck with in-season management

lore.divisions: Yahoo division names kept as historical record; canonical league names: first listed each season = O'Conner Memorial Division (winner: Brian O'Conner Trophy), second = Toretto Family Division (winner: Toretto Family Division Trophy).
lore.championship: Champion wins the Teremana Añejo trophy, runner-up the Teremana Blanco. The Teremana Reposado was RETIRED in the 2026-07-18 lore drop (Teremana branding is now championship-exclusive). Venue rotation and attendance are league canon per seasons.<yr>.championship; only repeat host is Hard Rock Stadium (2013, and the 2020 LMFL Bubble that hosted every postseason game).
lore.consolation: Ludacris Presents the Magic City Lemon Pepper Wing Bowl — the consolation bracket championship, hosted in Atlanta (Bobby Dodd 2013, The Georgia Dome 2014-2016, Mercedes-Benz Stadium 2017+; 2020 in the LMFL Bubble). Decided by the 7th Place Game (5th Place Game in 2013's 8-team year). Supersedes the Han Lue Tokyo Drift Classic-at-Tokyo-Dome consolation canon of 2026-07-12.
lore.points_leader: Letty Ortiz Award for Excellence in Roster Management.
lore.attendance: Attendance figures are canon exactly as given per game in seasons.<yr> (2026-07-18 drop). The old 'capacity sellout every year' rule is dead; 2020 postseason games all drew 26,130 in the LMFL Bubble.
lore.third_place_game: Kumho Tires Tokyo Drift Bowl — the 3rd Place Finals, home: Tokyo Dome, Tokyo. Winner takes the Han Lue Tokyo Drift Classic trophy (the Han Lue name traveled with Tokyo when the Tokyo Drift branding moved from the consolation bracket to the 3rd place game, 2026-07-18). Exceptions: 2020 Hard Rock (LMFL Bubble), 2021 Camping World Orlando, 2022 Raymond James Tampa.
lore.ninth_place_game: Voltron Global Bowl Hosted by Tyrese Gibson (Tyrese's conglomerate, Voltron Global) — the 9th Place Finals (7th Place Game in 2013's 8-team year), hosted in the most exciting and dangerous places on earth. Attendance is canon exactly as recorded, including '41 Vehicles', '1 Fatality', '97 Arrests', and the zeroes.
lore.superseded: 2026-07-18 lore drop replaced: Rose Bowl/Camping World 3rd-place alternation, Tokyo-Dome consolation, Brice-biography championship venue rationale (U.S. Bank Minneapolis is out of the rotation), sellout attendance rule.

_notes.participants: All bowl participants derive from league.json final ranks: championship 1v2, Tokyo Drift 3v4, Wing Bowl 7v8 (5v6 in 2013), Voltron 9v10 (7v8 in 2013). Verified 2026-07-18; the source graphics contained four Kyle/Dylan Snyder swaps (2013 Voltron winner, 2013 Wing runner-up, 2016 Wing winner, 2016 championship runner-up) — this file is correct, graphics need fixing.
